nodes.name: Check Calendar (2hr before meetings)
nodes.notes: Polls every 15 min looking for events ~2 hours from now. Adjust the time window if needed.

nodes.name: Is Client Meeting?
nodes.notes: Only proceed if we matched a client. Non-client meetings are skipped.
